claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: No new calibrated flag data, real hardware trace, holdout improvement, production decoder, threshold, or low-overhead QEC claim is established by this contract gate.
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: B2 now has explicit PR packets for the three blockers that prevent calibration transfer: calibrated flag data, real or independently calibrated hardware traces, and strict holdout improvement with non-regression.

contract_packets.acceptance_rule: calibrated_flag_data_used must become true without changing the per-shot decoder interface or claiming hardware advantage.
required_artifacts: per-shot detector bitstrings using the existing B2 trace schema
per-shot observable bitstrings or logical labels
calibrated flag confusion matrix with provenance
calibration date, backend family, noise slice, and shot count metadata

contract_packets.acceptance_rule: real_hardware_trace_used must become true and replay must produce the same summary fields as the current guardrail.
required_artifacts: independent real or provider-calibrated trace rows
same decoder replay command used for synthetic B2 traces
explicit separation between calibration, model-selection, and holdout slices

contract_packets.acceptance_rule: best_profile_holdout_injected_failures must be strictly lower than the current baseline 16 while introduced failures remain zero.
required_artifacts: strict holdout baseline logical failure count
strict holdout injected logical failure count
negative-control profile where flags are shuffled or withheld

contract_requirements.acceptance_rule: The source guardrail must stay valid and fail only C4/C5/C6.
contract_requirements.label: Source guardrail is a valid negative calibration-transfer boundary

contract_requirements.acceptance_rule: Keep at least the current three-challenge / 576-trace replay shape.
contract_requirements.label: Replayable per-shot trace schema remains available

contract_requirements.acceptance_rule: Every failed blocker must map to a concrete PR packet.
contract_requirements.label: PR packets exist for every failed calibration-transfer gate

contract_requirements.acceptance_rule: Submit calibrated leakage/erasure flag observations with confusion metadata.
contract_requirements.label: Calibrated flag-data packet has been satisfied

contract_requirements.acceptance_rule: Submit real or independently calibrated hardware traces replayed by the same decoder.
contract_requirements.label: Real hardware trace-replay packet has been satisfied

contract_requirements.acceptance_rule: Show strictly fewer holdout logical failures under calibrated injection.
contract_requirements.label: Holdout improvement packet has been satisfied

contract_requirements.acceptance_rule: Keep non-regression true after C4/C5 data are introduced.
contract_requirements.label: Holdout non-regression remains preserved

contract_requirements.acceptance_rule: Do not promote B2 until K4-K6 pass under replayable evidence.
contract_requirements.label: Forbidden production, threshold, hardware, and advantage claims remain absent

title: B2 calibrated evidence contract gate
toolchain: Consumes the B2 calibration-transfer guardrail and decomposes its C4/C5/C6 blockers into PR-ready data contracts for calibrated flag data, hardware trace replay, and strict holdout improvement.
